title: kaori.pipeline.upload.received
description: Fired by data-pipeline POST /upload after a file lands in bronze. Producer: services/data-pipeline/bronze/ingestor.py:130.

run_id.description: pipeline_runs.run_id — UUID string. Joins to bronze_files / silver_rows / analysis_runs.

enterprise_id.description: Tenant scope. Always set; consumers filter cross-tenant work by this.

filename.description: Original upload filename. Used in the dashboard run list.

sha256.description: K-8 idempotency key — same content = same hash, dedupe at ingest.

size_bytes.description: Raw upload size. Surfaced for billing/auditing.
